stories.title: NBA playoff takeaways: Cavaliers close out Pistons...
stories.summary: Here's what we've learned from the conference semifinals.

stories.title: Rory fires back at fan after 'USA' shout from gall...
stories.summary: Rory McIlroy's frustrating final round at the PGA Championship on Sunday boiled over with an angry exchange with a fan after a "U-S-A!" shout from the gallery at Aronimink Golf Club.

stories.title: Clark sets mark with stat boost, then sets it agai...
stories.summary: A statistical correction helped Caitlin Clark set a WNBA record for 20-point, 10-assist games hours before she added to it with another stellar performance Sunday.

stories.title: Sources: Nashville expected to host SB 2030
stories.summary: NFL owners are expected to name Nashville as host of Super Bowl LXIV in 2030 when they meet Tuesday for the league's spring meeting, sources told the NFL Network's Ian Rapoport and Mike Garafolo.

stories.title: 14-4 under Mattingly, Phils surge over .500 mark
stories.summary: The resurgent Phillies improved to 15-4 since interim manager Don Mattingly took over, and they also shot over the .500 mark, at 24-23, for the first time since April 7 as Philadelphia beat the Pittsburgh Pirates 6-0, completing a three-game sweep Sunday.
